posts.title: Bonus: Rinnai Repair Elanora Heights
posts.content:
## Publishing Notes
- Post 1 first, Post 2 two days later — don't stack same day
- These count as GBP posts only (separate from website publish rate limit)
- GBP allows 2-3 posts/week
- Log in dev/seo/gbp-post-log.md after publishing
